title: Identify and match uncommon automotive parts
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and match uncommon automotive parts demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine required information relating to uncommon part

pcs.text: Gather and document available information on required uncommon part and confirm with customer1.2 Determine original host for part from available information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Gather and document available information on required uncommon part and confirm with customer1.2 Determine original host for part from available information?

elements.title: Identify and record details of part

pcs.text: Identify and access parts index system for host 2.2 Match part to cataloguing information by accessing and using parts index system, its aids and user guides, and identify potential suppliers 2.3 Seek clarification regarding potential match from supplier as required2.4 Document and process identifying details of part
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access parts index system for host 2.2 Match part to cataloguing information by accessing and using parts index system, its aids and user guides, and identify potential suppliers 2.3 Seek clarification regarding potential match from supplier as required2.4 Document and process identifying details of part?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify and record details of part

elements.title: Supply or order part

pcs.text: Supply part to customer or order if not in stock according to workplace procedures 3.2 Process workplace documentation, including customer records, according to workplace procedures
